title: Hearty Lentil Stew
description: A comforting and nutritious stew made with lentils, stew meat, and a hint of caramelized flavor. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Add the stew meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the caramelized onions, carrots, and potatoes to the pot. Cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the lentils, tomato paste, vegetable broth, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
